specific_location: The parking lot of the Chatfield Wetlands on South Wadsworth.
description: I saw the birds across the parking lot at some distance and noticed the distinctly white belly on the male bluebird. I then walked toward the birds and had a good look at the male with the blue crown, orange throat, and white belly. I didn't pay as much attention to the drab female but did notice the lighter blue back, orange sides, and white on neck and belly.Behaviors: The birds were feeding in a Russian Olive tree before flying away.Call: N/APlumage: adult male and drab female
